name: Santana S.A.
summary: Santana S.A. engages in the investment activities in Chile. It invests in real estate, stocks, investment funds, promissory notes, mutual funds, and bonds. The company was formerly known as Fabrica de Envases S.A. and changed its name to Santana S.A. in 1992. Santana S.A. was founded in 1940 and is headquartered in Santiago, Chile.
